zh.Longford, Derbyshire, England, United Ki: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾隆福德
zh.Ellastone, Ashbourne, Staffordshire, Eng: 英國斯塔福爾艾拉亞斯同
zh.Derby, Derbyshire, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾德比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas de Longford II於1324年出生在英國德比夏爾隆福德時，他的父親Nicholas Longford I39歲，母親Alice Boteler34歲。他於1346年9月29日與Alice D. Eyncourt在英國英格蘭德比夏爾德比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1373年5月23日在他的家鄉享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas de Longford II于1324年出生在英国德比夏爾隆福德时，他的父亲Nicholas Longford I39岁，母亲Alice Boteler34岁。他于1346年9月29日与Alice D. Eyncourt在英国英格兰德比夏爾德比结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1373年5月23日在他的家乡享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰德比夏爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Longford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Langford
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called with Old English lang ‘long’ + ford ‘ford’, such as Langford (Bedfordshire, Nottinghamshire, Essex, Norfolk).

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas de Longford II was born in 1324, in Longford, Derbyshire, England, his father, Nicholas Longford I, was 39 and his mother, Alice Boteler, was 34. He married Alice D. Eyncourt on 29 September 1346, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 23 May 1373, in his hometown, at the age of 49, and was buried in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas de Longford II est né en 1324, à Longford, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Longford I, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Alice Boteler, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Alice D. Eyncourt le 29 septembre 1346, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 23 mai 1373, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas de Longford II 1324 in Longford, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Longford I 39 und seine Mutter Alice Boteler 34. Er hat am 29. September 1346 in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Alice D. Eyncourt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 23. Mai 1373 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Longford II è nato il nel 1324 nel Longford, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Nicholas Longford I, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Alice Boteler, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Alice D. Eyncourt il 29 settembre 1346, nel Derby, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 23 maggio 1373, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Longford IIが1324年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアロングフォードで生まれた時，父Nicholas Longford Iは39歳，母Alice Botelerは34歳であった。1346年9月29日にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーでAlice D. Eyncourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1373年5月23日に故郷で49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Longford II(이)가 1324년 영국 더비실르 론그퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Longford I(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Boteler(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1346년 9월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 더비에서 Alice D. Eyncourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1373년 5월 23일 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Longford II nasceu em 1324, em Longford, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Longford I, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Alice Boteler, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice D. Eyncourt em 29 de setembro de 1346, em Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de maio de 1373, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas de Longford II родился в 1324 г. в местности лонгфорд, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas Longford I было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Boteler, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice D. Eyncourt 29 сентября 1346 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 23 мая 1373 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas de Longford II nació en 1324, en Longford, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Longford I, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Alice Boteler, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Alice D. Eyncourt el 29 de septiembre de 1346, en Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de mayo de 1373, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
